message:
feat(mvcc,vdbe): add uncontended finalize fast path and inline hot register lookup

MVCC (begin_concurrent.rs):
- Add can_use_uncontended_finalize_fast_path() check mirroring the
  existing prepare-phase uncontended detection
- When both prepare and finalize see no concurrent overlap, skip SSI
  edge re-scanning, committed reader/writer history publication, and
  pivot re-evaluation — go straight to commit-index update, lock
  release, and mark-committed
- Tag PreparedConcurrentCommit with used_uncontended_prepare_fast_path
  so finalize knows whether the prepare phase already took the
  shortcut
- Add test covering the full uncontended prepare+finalize path:
  verifies no SSI edges are manufactured, commit-index is updated,
  history queues stay empty, and page locks are released

VDBE (engine.rs):
- Mark get_reg() with #[inline(always)] to eliminate call overhead on
  the interpreter's hottest path
- Reformat concurrent_clear_page_state call for readability (no
  behavioral change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
